dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8634 IH: Consanguineous Marriage Prohibition Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Self introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To prohibit marriages between individuals who are closely related by blood.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Consanguineous Marriage Prohibition Act of 2026.

Section 7 of title 1, United States Code, is amended by striking 2 individuals and inserting 2 individuals who are not related by affinity or consanguinity within the degree of first cousin each place it appears.
